description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on push, pull request, page build, and release events for the master and vnext branches. The workflow has two jobs: test and docs. The test job uses a matrix strategy to run on ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest with different Python versions and shells. It checks out the repository, sets up Miniconda, installs the package and Codecov, runs tests with pytest, and uploads test results. The docs job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, sets up Miniconda, installs the package, builds documentation with Sphinx, and uploads the HTML output as an artifact.
